headline: Is Hartford Insurance Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Though Hartford Insurance has lagged behind the broader Nasdaq Composite over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on The Hartford Insurance Gr, Lowers Price Target to $148
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Paul Newsome   maintains The Hartford Insurance Gr (NYSE:HIG) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $154 to $148.
